message:
test(output_format): add 21 property-based tests for OutputFormat (wa-1u90p.7.1)

Cover Display↔FromStr roundtrip, case-insensitive parsing, "text" alias
for Plain, invalid string rejection, Default==Auto, is_json/is_plain
mutual exclusion, is_rich() for Json/Plain always false, effective()
resolution, and Copy/Clone/Debug trait invariants.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
